title: Close-out: full verify suite green, follow-up PBI for 5 newer helpers, feature decision log
action: Close the feature honestly. (1) Run the full verify surface and paste fresh output as evidence: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs; node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs; node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs; node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs; node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs; node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs; node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs. All green or the cell blocks. (2) File the follow-up via CLI (never hand-edit; probe the CLI's usage with a bogus flag first if flags are unclear): node .bee/bin/bee_backlog.mjs add — proposal to extend the unified dispatcher + registry + bijection test to the 5 newer helpers (bee_state, bee_backlog, bee_capture, bee_reviews, bee_feedback), citing DA6 of decision 30606de4. The proposal text MUST name bee_feedback explicitly (machine-checked in verify). (3) Log the feature decision via node .bee/bin/bee_decisions.mjs log (source agent): dispatcher adopted from vantt PR #1, mechanism DA1, exclusions DA2, adaptations DA3-DA5, scope DA6, plus the pre-existing vendored-hook drift fixed by hia-1 — one entry, rationale citing plan.md and this cell's fresh test evidence.

truths: every listed suite command exits 0 at this cell's cap time, evidence quoted in the cell report
backlog carries the 5-helper follow-up as proposed, added via bee_backlog.mjs
the feature decision entry exists via bee_decisions.mjs with agent source
prohibitions: no PR comment / close (user-confirmed step outside cells, DA7)
no git push / no release tag (release flow is a separate user-approved step)
